title: watsonia punctata var. triticea
intro: Watsonia punctata var. triticea is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the 'glowing spear,' that belongs to the Iridaceae family. It is native to southern Africa and is prized for its vibrant, orange-red flowers that bloom in late winter to early spring. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. Watsonia punctata var. triticea can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and fever.
